# Page 1^page=1
Agenda 6th Annual General Assembly Date/Time: 12. June 2026, 09:00 – 14:00 CET Location: IDTA, Lyoner Strasse 18, 60528 Frankfurt am Main (c/o VDMA) 01 | 09:00 Opening to the General Assembly - Presentation and approval of the agenda - Confirmation of the quorum - Appointment of the secretary Christian Mosch 02 | 09:05 Antitrust Law and Compliance in the IDTA Christian Mosch 03 | 09:10 Welcome Address and Report of the Board of Directors Matthias Bölke Horst Heinol-Heikkinen 04 | 09:40 Introduction to the international activities of IDTA Matthias Bölke 05 | 09:55 Reports from Working Group Chairs - WG Open Technology (20 min) - WG Submodels (20 min) - WG Use Cases (10 min) - WG Marketing (10 min) - JWG Building (15 min) Birgit Boss Michael Hoffmeister Ernst Esslinger Sabine Schilling Christian Frey 11:10 Coffee Break (30 min) 06 | 11:40 Financial Report 2025 and Budget Proposal 2026 Karsten Schneider 07 | 11:55 Discharge of the Board of Directors and Management Official delegates 08 | 12:00 Membership Dues: Amendment of the Fee Structure - Gradual increase over a period of two years Christian Mosch 09 | 12:10 Articles of Association: Amendment of the Termination Period - Proposed extension from 3 months to 6 months Christian Mosch 10 | 12:20 IPR Policy: Addition of an Export Control Clause - Addition of a new paragraph on export control Christian Mosch 11 | 12:30 Election of the Board of Directors Official delegates

# Page 2^page=2
12 | 12:55 Outlook and next steps for IDTA in 2026 (10 min) Christian Mosch 13 | 13:10 Closing of the General Assembly Matthias Bölke 13:15 Lunch 14:00 End of the Event
